description_long: This is a medium-sized, twin-engine turboprop airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a high-mounted straight wing configuration. The aircraft features a T-tail design, with the horizontal stabilizer mounted atop the vertical fin at the rear. The engines are mounted on the wings, each equipped with a multi-blade propeller. The fuselage is elongated and cylindrical, with a rounded nose and a cockpit positioned at the front, featuring multiple windows. The exterior appears to be primarily smooth and painted in a light color, likely white, with minimal visible markings. The landing gear is not visible in these views, suggesting it may be retractable.
description: A sleek, twin-propeller airplane with a high-mounted straight wing and T-tail, featuring a streamlined white fuselage and forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, high-mounted straight wings with two propeller engines, and the T-tail at the rear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide wingspan, twin propellers, and the rounded nose with cockpit windows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the same high-wing, twin-propeller configuration and T-tail.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the T-tail structure, the tapering fuselage, and the symmetrical placement of the engines on the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin turboprop engines mounted on the wings.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer mounted at the top.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable tricycle configuration based on typical design.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows at the front of the fuselage.
